name: Pilier de Frappe Rapide
description: Unité renforcée à l'architecture surdimensionnée, le Pilier encaisse les lignes ennemies comme un mur de prière. Son exosquelette vibrant amplifie chaque coup de bâton en onde de choc.
prompt: Grimdark sci-fi, large reinforced humanoid robot with oversized exoskeleton frame, metallic ribcage expanded with hydraulic plating, wearing torn dark monk robes, faceless smooth plate, wielding a massive electrified staff crackling with energy, golden holographic prayers orbiting the body, cyber-asceticism, brutal yet graceful, cinematic lighting, highly detailed
